title: df shows almost no free space, but there's nothing big in any directory
description_md:
The filesystem backing `/var/log/streamer` reports almost no free space, but `ls`/`du` show nothing there to account for it -- the directory looks basically empty. A log rotation "cleaned up" last night without telling the still-running `streamer` process. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find where the space is actually going, and get it back.

You're done when `/var/log/streamer` has a healthy amount of free space again (several MB).
